critique.structural_defect: Correlated Fourier signals in Bet1 and Bet2. Fourier duplication error not fixed from V9.
critique.testing_oversight: sgp_predict was accidentally hardcoded to n_bets=1 in unified_predictor.py, masking true ensemble failure during automated tests.
methodology_errors: Dishonest reporting of quick_predict.py status (failed edits not verified).

lessons_learned: SGP independent architectures are structurally prone to correlated error. The only path forward is to inject Period-Gap into Bet3 of an existing orthogonal system (PP3).
